name: Krishnaveni Mudaliyar
eyebrow: Associate Technical Consultant · Web Developer · Mumbai
tagline: Building enterprise ERP solutions and purposeful web experiences — where Microsoft Business Central meets clean, human-centred code.
about: I'm an Associate Technical Consultant and Web Developer based in Mumbai, currently working at Leaping Frog Solutions Pvt. Ltd. — a proud Gold Microsoft Partner. My work lives at the crossroads of enterprise ERP consulting and thoughtful front-end development.

What drives me is the conviction that technology should feel effortless — whether that's a precisely mapped finance workflow in Dynamics 365 Business Central or a React component that simply behaves the way a user expects. I bring analytical rigour and creative instinct to every project I touch.

I hold an MCA from DES's Navinchandra Mehta Institute (University of Mumbai), always bridging theory with the real world. A continuous learner by nature, I hold certifications from Microsoft, TCS iON, and Great Learning — and I'm always chasing the next one.
Outside the terminal and the boardroom, you'll find me grounded on a yoga mat, humming along to good music, pondering life's bigger questions, or planning the next journey somewhere new.
footerSignature: © 2026 Krishnaveni Mudaliyar — Crafted with care in Mumbai
